core_philosophy: Reasoning Intelligence (AI) + Kinetic Imagination (Monte Carlo) = Mission Success. No heuristics. No fake progress.

world_manifest.topology: Procedural heightmaps with cratering logic (Little Prince style)

level_1_architect.logic: Deep topographic hazards analysis. No straight lines. Respects gradient variance.

level_2_povodir.input: Architect Waypoints + Real-time Telemetry + Monte Carlo Risk Data
level_2_povodir.logic: Executes the long-term plan while surviving immediate physics violations.

metrics.sCVaR: Spectral Conditional Value at Risk (Severity of failure)
metrics.SMaR: Safety Margin at Risk (Buffer to rollover)

operational_modes.ai_assist: Human control + Monte Carlo overlay (Ghost Trajectories).
operational_modes.full_autopilot: Povodir-driven trajectory based on Architect path, throttled by sCVaR/SMaR thresholds.

instruction_to_next_agent.step_0: Initialize spherical world with raycast-based surface mapping.
instruction_to_next_agent.step_1: Implement the Monte Carlo worker as the primary source of truth for risk.
instruction_to_next_agent.step_2: Integrate Reasoning API (Gemini/Cosmos) as the Architect role.
instruction_to_next_agent.step_3: Build the Povodir logic to dynamically weight Architect waypoints against Monte Carlo 'Red' zones.
instruction_to_next_agent.step_4: Enforce 100% Transparency. Never use heuristics to hide AI unavailability.
